name: Stephen Muscato
background: Mr. Muscato has served as Executive Vice President and Chief Commercial Officer since December 2020. He previously served as Senior Vice President and Chief Commercial Officer from 2016 to 2020. He is responsible for the company's commercial operations, including power marketing and fuel supply.

company_affiliations.name: Vistra Corp.
company_affiliations.title_or_role: Executive Vice President, President-Wholesale Operations & Development
